name: vibe-workbench
description: Repo-aware Codex helpers for the Vibe project: orient on the repo, prepare lane handoffs, and check the self-plan.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-grounded helpers for Vibe lane work.
interface.longDescription: Codex integration for the Vibe repository. Packages repo-grounded skills for orientation, self-plan drift checks, and lane handoffs while sharing the same Vibe contract used by the Claude Code plugin.
defaultPrompt: Orient on the Vibe repo and recommend the next slice.
Prepare a Vibe lane handoff with scope and verification.
Check the Vibe self-plan for drift against examples/vibe-self.vibe.
